I. range of \(P \lt \) range of \(Q\)
II. median of \(P \lt \) median of \(Q\)
III. the \(3^{\text{rd}}\) quartile of \(P \lt \) the \(3^{\text{rd}}\) quartile of \(Q\)

III. median of \(P \gt \) median of \(Q\)
